rulings.Case Title: GABRIELA GEYER et al VS. MERIDIAN MANAGEMENT GROUP et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Sanctions For Failure To Obey A Court Order
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, June 10, 2014, line 5. Sanctions For Failure To Obey A Court Order GRANTED, in part and DENIED, in part. Motion is granted as to the request for monetary sections for misuse of discovery in the amount of $9,500. Motion is otherwise denied. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: GARY PASQUINELLI et al VS. NORA A. YEGEHYAIAN et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, June 10, 2014, line 1. DEFENDANT NORA YEGHYAIAN's MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT DENIED. The Court declines to exercise its discretion in absence of any argument or authorities provided in the moving papers. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JINYUAN ZHOU VS. GREGORY T. SUNDAY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Hearing On Defs' Mtn For Order Striking Portions Of 2nd Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, June 10, 2014, line 2. DEFENDANTS GREGORY T. SUNDAY and BEULAH SUNDAY's Motion For Order Striking Portions Of 2nd Amended Complaint DENIED. "New" cause of action falls within the leave to amend granted by the Court in its order sustaining the demurrer to the First Amended Complaint with leave to amend. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JINYUAN ZHOU VS. GREGORY T. SUNDAY et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, June 10, 2014, line 2. DEFENDANTS GREGORY T. SUNDAY and BEULAH SUNDAY's DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT OVERRULED. All causes of action are sufficiently alleged. Moving party is ordered to provide complete citations to authorities in future. See Demurrer 5:27-28. Opposing party is ordered to comply with CRC 3.1113 (f) in future. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: EILEEN DUFFY et al VS. MURPHY INVESTMENTS et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, June 10, 2014, line 3. DEFENDANT DAVID WASSERMAN's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT Continued to June 27, 2014 to be heard with other pending motions. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: EILEEN DUFFY et al VS. MURPHY INVESTMENTS et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, June 10, 2014, line 3. DEFENDANT DAVID WASSERMAN's MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT Continued to June 27, 2014 to be heard with other pending motions. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MABEN ROMERO VS. LEAH M CHEUK et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CUD-14-648809 WITH CASE CUD-14-648179
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, June 10, 2014, line 4. PLAINTIFF MABEN ROMERO's MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CUD-14-648809 WITH CASE CUD-14-648179 DENIED without prejudice. Defendants have not appeared in CUD-14-648809 and there is no Proof of Service of Summons and Complaint ion file. = (501/REQ)
